item.title: A New Start
item.description: Whew! I finally got this blog up and running. It took me longer than I expected, but I’m happy with the result. I really hope this blog will help me keep track of my progress and not end up a big pile of shit. Anyway, let’s see how it goes. o7

About me I am C0smic or Tùn le te (for those who know me). At the time of writing this, I am an IT student at VNUHCM - University of Science and a member of HCMUS Computer Security Club. Why this blog? I created this blog to store my notes in the field of IT in general and Information Security in particular. Sometimes I will write about my personal life, but that’s not the main focus (and it’s not like anyone will give a damn about it anyway lol).
